creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
On the last page of the article

Problem Report Handling Guidelines
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/pr-guidelines/references.html

is a footer. Great.

If you read this small article as a single HTML page, the footer is missing
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/pr-guidelines/article.html

It looks like a corrupted page (but isn't). I think that the single HTML page should have an standard footer as well.
